coach_notes: To build a strong design career, focus on mastering graphic design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) and typography, as these are foundational for most design roles. Start with free tutorials on platforms like YouTube or Coursera to learn the basics, then practice by recreating designs you admire. Your existing skills in cross-functional teams and leadership will help you collaborate effectively, so leverage those while building your technical design expertise.

jobs.title: Restaurant Shift Leader, Upper East Side
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong overlap in communication, problem-solving, and cross-functional teams. Warehouse and receiving experience translate to inventory and shift logistics. Education and analytical thinking support scheduling and best practices.
jobs.gaps: No direct restaurant or food service experience. May need to learn specific POS systems and health code compliance.

jobs.title: Customer Service Lead
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Sales, communication, and problem-solving directly apply to customer service leadership. Warehouse and receiving experience indicate logistics and team coordination. Cross-functional teams and best practices support process improvement.
jobs.gaps: No explicit customer service management experience. May need to develop conflict resolution skills and CRM system knowledge.

jobs.title: Management Trainee
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Education, problem-solving, and analytical thinking are key for management training. Sales and warehouse experience show operational understanding. Cross-functional teams and production planning align with trainee roles.
jobs.gaps: No direct management experience. May need to learn company-specific processes and leadership techniques.

jobs.title: Junior Consultant
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Analytical thinking, problem-solving, and communication are core consulting skills. Experience with proposals and cross-functional teams aligns with client projects. Education provides a foundation.
jobs.gaps: No formal consulting experience. May lack familiarity with specific consulting frameworks, data analysis tools (e.g., Excel, SQL), and client presentation skills.

jobs.title: Installation Apprentice
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Tools, work orders, and process implementation experience are relevant. CAD and proposals indicate technical aptitude. Problem-solving and analytical thinking support installation troubleshooting.
jobs.gaps: No hands-on installation or apprenticeship experience. May lack specific trade skills (e.g., electrical, plumbing) and safety certifications.
